abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
abilities.effect: Whenever this Pokémon flinches, its Speed rises one stage.
Increases the power of all 'slicing' moves by 50%.

abilities.shortEffect: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a Dark move.
abilities.effect:
Whenever a Dark-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage.

The move is not negated in any way.
